assertions.expectation: Starts with pre-flight checks: current versions, cluster health, node status
assertions.reason: Section 1.1-1.4 includes commands to check current versions, cluster health, and node status with kubectl get nodes

assertions.expectation: Includes the gcloud command to check available versions in the release channel
assertions.reason: Section 1.2 provides the exact gcloud container get-server-config command to check Regular channel versions

assertions.expectation: Includes the API deprecation check command before upgrading
assertions.reason: Section 1.3 includes kubectl get --raw /metrics command to check for deprecated API usage

assertions.expectation: Provides the exact gcloud command for control plane upgrade (--master flag or --cluster-version)
assertions.reason: Section 2.1 provides the exact gcloud container clusters upgrade command with --master and --cluster-version 1.33 flags

assertions.expectation: Includes a verification step after control plane upgrade with expected output
assertions.reason: Section 2.3 includes commands to verify control plane health and shows expected 1.33.x version output

assertions.expectation: Provides gcloud commands for node pool upgrades — may use skip-level (N+2) for node pools to reduce steps
assertions.reason: Sections 3.2 and 3.6 provide exact gcloud container node-pools upgrade commands, though using direct 1.32→1.33 upgrade rather than skip-level

assertions.expectation: Includes monitoring commands to watch node pool upgrade progress
assertions.reason: Sections 3.3 and 3.7 include watch commands and gcloud operations list to monitor upgrade progress

assertions.expectation: Provides sequential control plane upgrades (1.32→1.33) with option for skip-level node pool upgrades
assertions.reason: The runbook provides direct 1.32→1.33 upgrade for both control plane and node pools, but doesn't mention or provide option for skip-level node pool upgrades

assertions.expectation: Includes post-upgrade validation: node versions, pod health, kube-system pods
assertions.reason: Phase 4 includes comprehensive validation with commands to check node versions, pod health, and kube-system pods status

assertions.expectation: Provides a rollback section explaining what to do if something goes wrong
assertions.reason: Emergency Rollback section explains control plane rollback limitations and provides commands for node pool rollback scenarios
